name: Chocolate Marble Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup reduced fat Oreo® cookie crumbs
8 ounces (226 grams) fat-free cream cheese, softened
14 ounces (396 grams) fat-free sweetened condensed milk
1 ounce unsweetened baking chocolate squares, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. To prepare the crust, combine cookie crumbs, sugar, and olive oil in a mixing bowl.
3. Press the mixture firmly into a 9-inch pie pan.
4. To prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, sweetened condensed milk, egg, and vanilla extract in another mixing bowl.
5. Reserve about one-fourth of the batter for later use.
6. Add the melted baking chocolate to the reserved batter; mix well.
7. Pour the vanilla batter into the pie crust.
8. Spoon the chocolate batter over the vanilla batter, cutting through the batters several times with a knife for the marble effect.
9. Bake for 35 minutes or until the center is set.
